runTitle: Cloud Run Admin Observability Pack - Monitoring + Traces Direct Check
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run /monitoring auth gate (403 without X-API-Key)
skippedSurfaces: Vercel dashboard observability panel (covered in QA-20260321-0151)
fresh marker trace search (sampling 10% makes same-run capture non-deterministic)
Langfuse htmlPath/traceUrl deep link (current trace payload had no htmlPath field)

expertAssessments.rationale: Authenticated Cloud Run /monitoring returned 200 with langfuse.isOperational=true, sampleRate=10%, and /monitoring/traces returned 200 on the direct run.app host. Vercel /monitoring/traces 404 is therefore a host mismatch, not an endpoint regression.
Cloud Run admin monitoring endpoints still enforce X-API-Key. Unauthenticated /monitoring returned 403 while authenticated requests succeeded.

notes: Authenticated /monitoring returned langfuse.eventCount=63, sampleRate=10%, isOperational=true, hasKeysConfigured=true.
Authenticated /monitoring/traces?limit=1 returned 200 with count=0, fetchedCount=1, includeAuxiliary=false.
Authenticated /monitoring/traces?limit=2&includeAuxiliary=true returned 200 with auxiliary timeout_monitor and supervisor-execution traces for sessionId kZ1CiM18T9FgC4qc.
Vercel host https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app/monitoring/traces returned 404, which matches the direct-host split documented in QA docs.
